---
name: 'Bug report'
about: 'Report a problem to help us improve CointMU'
title: '[Bug]: '
labels: 'bug'
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll to '...'
4. See the error

## Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

A clear and concise description of what actually happened. Include any error messages.

## Screenshots or Logs

If applicable, add screenshots or paste relevant log output to help explain the problem.
Remember to redact any seed phrases, private keys, or passwords.

## Environment

- CointMU version: [e.g. 1.5.1]
- Operating system: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 24.04]
- Node version (from Settings > About): [e.g. cointmu/v1.5.1]
- Installation method: [e.g. installer, built from source]

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here.
